name: Unity Mining Limited
description: Unity Mining Limited (ASX:UML) was an Australian gold explorer, developer, and producer. The company owned and operated the Henty Gold Mine on the West Coast of Tasmania and developed the Dargues Gold Mine in New South Wales. Additionally, Unity held interests in gold exploration projects in West Africa through its investment in GoldStone Resources Limited and maintained tenure over the Bendigo Goldfield in Victoria. The company aimed to become a successful mid-tier gold miner by discovering, operating, and acquiring quality gold assets in Australasia and West Africa before its eventual delisting.
